nasb.text: You shall count fifty days to the day after the seventh sabbath; then you shall present a new grain offering to the Lord.

esv.text: You shall count fifty days to the day after the seventh Sabbath. Then you shall present a grain offering of new grain to the Lord.

cnv.text: 到第七個星期的次日，共計五十天；那天你們要獻新的素祭給耶和華。

ccb.text: 一直数到第七个安息日后的第一天，共五十天。到那天，你们要把新收的谷物作为素祭献给耶和华。
